name: universal-file-watcher
description: Run any external tool on file save and display its output as inline diagnostics — no plugin per tool required.

commands.title: File Watcher: Run on Current File

universalFileWatcher.watchers.markdownDescription: List of file watchers. Each watcher defines a command to run on file save and a regex to parse its output into diagnostics.

name.description: Display name for this watcher (shown in status bar and output channel).

filePattern.description: Glob pattern(s) of files that trigger this watcher. E.g. '**/*.py' or ['**/*.ts', '**/*.tsx'].

outputPattern.markdownDescription: Regular expression with named capture groups to parse each output line. Supported groups: `file`, `line`, `col`, `endLine`, `endCol`, `severity`, `code`, `message`. Example: `^(?<file>[^:]+):(?<line>\\d+):(?<col>\\d+): (?<severity>error|warning): (?<message>.+)$`

severity.description: Default severity when not captured by outputPattern.

runInShell.description: Run command through the system shell (allows pipes, env variables, etc.).

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Supports the same variables as 'command'.

env.description: Extra environment variables to set for the command.

parseStderr.description: Also parse stderr (in addition to stdout) for diagnostics.

applyTo.markdownDescription: Which file to attach diagnostics to: `savedFile` (always the file that was saved), `matchedFile` (use `file` capture group from outputPattern), `allFiles` (combine both strategies).

universalFileWatcher.enabled.description: Master switch — enable or disable all watchers.

universalFileWatcher.runOnOpen.description: Also run watchers when a file is first opened (in addition to on save).

universalFileWatcher.clearDiagnosticsOnS.description: Clear previous diagnostics for a file before running watchers on it.

universalFileWatcher.showOutputOnError.description: Automatically reveal the Output channel when a watcher produces errors.

universalFileWatcher.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after a save before running watchers (debounce).
